description_long: This is a large, cylindrical wooden barrel with a weathered, dark grayish-brown finish, constructed from vertical wooden staves. The barrel is reinforced by three prominent metal hoops, each fastened with evenly spaced rivets, which encircle the body and provide structural integrity. Both ends of the barrel are open, revealing a hollow interior, and there are no visible lids or closures. The wood grain and texture are clearly visible, giving the object a rustic, aged appearance typical of storage barrels found in urban or industrial settings. The metal bands are dark and slightly matte, contrasting with the rougher wood surface. There are no handles, markings, or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian function.
description: A large, open-ended wooden barrel with dark metal hoops and a weathered, rustic appearance. The barrel is hollow, reinforced with riveted bands, and lacks handles or markings.
description_view_0: The open end of the barrel is visible, showing the hollow interior and the curvature of the wooden staves.
description_view_1: A side view highlights the cylindrical shape, three metal hoops with rivets, and the wood grain texture.
description_view_2: The opposite open end is visible, similar to view 0, again showing the hollow interior.
description_view_3: Another side view, nearly identical to view 1, displaying the metal hoops and wood texture.
